live_cases.healthcheck_cmd: docker compose -f tests/integration/docker/postgres16-scram-tls.compose.yml exec -T postgres pg_isready -U aic -d aicdb
live_cases.smoke_cmd: docker compose -f tests/integration/docker/postgres16-scram-tls.compose.yml exec -T postgres psql "host=127.0.0.1 user=aic password=aicpass dbname=aicdb sslmode=require" -c "select 1;" >/dev/null

live_cases.healthcheck_cmd: docker compose -f tests/integration/docker/postgres15-trust.compose.yml exec -T postgres pg_isready -U aic -d aicdb
live_cases.smoke_cmd: docker compose -f tests/integration/docker/postgres15-trust.compose.yml exec -T postgres psql "host=127.0.0.1 user=aic dbname=aicdb sslmode=disable" -c "select 1;" >/dev/null

live_cases.healthcheck_cmd: docker compose -f tests/integration/docker/redis7-pass.compose.yml exec -T redis redis-cli -a aicpass ping | grep -q PONG
live_cases.smoke_cmd: docker compose -f tests/integration/docker/redis7-pass.compose.yml exec -T redis sh -lc "redis-cli -a aicpass set aic-smoke 42 >/dev/null && [ \"$(redis-cli -a aicpass get aic-smoke)\" = \"42\" ]"

live_cases.healthcheck_cmd: docker compose -f tests/integration/docker/kafka37-plaintext.compose.yml exec -T kafka kafka-topics.sh --bootstrap-server localhost:9092 --list >/dev/null
live_cases.smoke_cmd: docker compose -f tests/integration/docker/kafka37-plaintext.compose.yml exec -T kafka sh -lc "kafka-topics.sh --bootstrap-server localhost:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic aic-smoke --partitions 1 --replication-factor 1 >/dev/null && kafka-topics.sh --bootstrap-server localhost:9092 --list | grep -q '^aic-smoke$'"
